titleStmt.title: SII 6.1136: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1136. (A.R. No. 356-F of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . yaccāritraṁ purāṇakṣitipaticaritasparddhi lōkēṣu pūjyaṁ yadgātraṁ śrīnivāsaṁ yu
vatijanamanaściṁdrakāṁtēṁdubiṁbaṁ . yatkīrttiḥ svargagaṁgātaṭabhuvi ramatē sōyamācaṁdratāraṁ
pātraśrīdharmmadāsassakaḷaguṇanidhiḥ vatāt bhūtaḷēsmin . śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1296 gunēṁṭi jyēṣṭa kriṣṇa
treyōdasiyu guruvāramunāṁḍu kaḷiṁgaparīkṣa patrāśrīdarmadāsujīyana sīnarasiṁhanādu
ni bhaṁḍāramaṁdu padmanidhi gaṁḍamāḍalu 40 peṭiri tā kaṭiṁcina darmmadvāranaku kolu Uṁḍaṭi
bōḍigaku reṁḍu kuṁcālu prasādamu Ēṁḍādijītamu māḍa Okaṭi nityamunnu dī
pānaku nūnya māna Okaṭi Ī dvāranaku Ayudu Ēṁḍlanu Okamāṭu sunna
mu peṭṭhanu Īṁtavaṭṭunu vṛttigānu paḍaśenu maṟinni gaṁḍalu padāṟu māḍa
lu peṭṭi nityamunnu Oka doṁḍavanamāla peṭṭanu reṁḍu kuṁcālu prasādamu nibha
ṁdasamasyagānu A(ṁ)ppālū viḍiyālu Ēṁḍādijītamu cinnālu 8 Iṁtavaṭṭu
kunnu Ī pahiṁḍilōna padi māḍalu 10 tōṁṭagaṭlaku Āṟu maḍalu 6 . Ī prasādamu
nnu tōṁṭaguṭlunnu cittaramahāmaṁḍleṁḍu ciṁgusāhasamalluni mūlamuna Anavāla A
namannu bumi pūrāI nityamunaṁ dhupakalamaṁdu doṁḍavanamāla nalumūḍlu 4 tecci pe
ṭaṁggalāru Ī dharmmu Ācaṁdrārkkacchayigā cellaṁggaladu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa . Ī dharmamu Evvarēni
hariṁturu vāri śirassuna śrīviṣṇucakramu paḍaṁgaladu . Ī rmmamu Evvarēni hariṁturu vāri Ē
(Ē)ḍu puruṣāṁtaramulavāru [A]dhōgatiṁbaḍuduru Ī pātradarmmadasajīyana saptapurṣāṁta
ramulavāru sadugatiṁ bōduru śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
